'''Camarata''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugee working as a cook in [[Settlement 32]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the German version of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' her name is ''Amarata''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
